Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1068 "MAXWELLMANOR-C500-1068" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $c500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Maxwell Manor (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: This game has a BASIC loading screen which uses a SYS command to start the game when it has finished loading. Therefore the following steps were taken to use this: 1. The LOAD "MAX.BIN",8,1 instruction on line 130 was changed to SYS 50688 ($C600). 2. A new routine was placed at $C500 which sets up the correct VICII settings and necessary BASIC pointers and runs the loading screen program. 3. A new routine was placed at $C600 which waits for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game. 4. Because of its use of the raster IRQ, this game is particularly sensitive to timing when starting up. Therefore, this routine also syncs itself to a number of VBLANKS before calling IOINIT ($FDA3) and then finally by jumping to $1068. This prevents the game from sometimes locking up during startup on a PAL machine.
